task.objective: Remediate the second independent governor review findings for Proofrail Foundation Gate Mechanization without widening product scope or changing canonical Proofrail product semantics.

requirements: Final validator output must replace unregistered emitted finding codes with registered governance diagnostics when a valid non-empty harness reason-code registry is available.
Unsafe repository paths accepted from Foundation governance config must produce deterministic registered HARN_ findings rather than uncaught exceptions.
Machine Task Contract authority semantics must require both mayChangeAuthority and mayChangeProductSemantics.
Generated projection sourceDigest must represent the normalized raw authoritative source section while structural extraction continues ignoring fenced fake headings.
Focused negative governance tests must cover the governor findings without weakening existing Foundation governance behavior.

requiredInvariants: Every final validator finding code is registered when the valid harness registry is available.
Injected unknown finding codes do not survive into final validator output.
Unsafe config repository paths cannot crash the validator.
Malformed path JSON validation output remains parseable JSON.
Both Machine Task Contract authority booleans are required.
Fenced fake headings do not change canonical set extraction.
Fenced authoritative source content changes affect sourceDigest.
No Proofrail product runtime package or execution path is introduced.

requiredArtifacts: explicit Machine Task Contract authority schema
stopConditions: resolving a finding requires Proofrail product runtime implementation
Machine Task Contract must gain product runtime authority
an external dependency other than the already authorized Ajv 8.x is required
the reviewed PR #2 branch or repository identity no longer matches preflight
